## Embeddable block

A loose sheet of vellum, edges deckled, surface untouched by ink. When
present in a panel, it is always the brightest value on the page —
never tinted, never shadowed. Slightly curled at one corner.

## Clauses

- Always brightest value — the motif IS the unmarked, the not-yet-known.
- Deckled edges — distinguishes from manufactured paper; this is hand-
  cut from a larger sheet.
